name: Sour Cream Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs, sour cream, and vanilla; beat well.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Alternately add oats, nuts, and raisins with the sifted ingredients.
5. Beat until smooth.
6. Drop by spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for about 15 minutes or until cookies are lightly browned and firm to the touch.
8. Cool on wire rack.
Makes about 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
